name: claude-toolkit-plugins
description: CLI toolkit and Claude workflow skills, split into two installable plugins.

plugins.name: cli-tools
plugins.description: Token-efficient CLI workflow skills (rg, fd, fzf, jq, jc, yq, rga, hyperfine) plus a Windows install command for the underlying tools.

plugins.name: claude-workflows
plugins.description: Workflow and discipline skills: crisp, karpathy, handoff, doc-coauthoring. Plus the /export-md command to export the current session to markdown via cc2md.
